hero.title: All-in-One Destiny Matrix Calculator
hero.subtitle: Discover life purpose, love line, money line, karmic tail, and compatibility — all from your birth date.

whatIsMatrix.title: What is the Matrix of Destiny?
whatIsMatrix.body: The Matrix of Destiny is a self-discovery system that uses your date of birth to generate a personal destiny matrix chart — revealing your life purpose, karmic patterns, and energetic blueprint through the 22 major arcana. Created by Natalia Ladini in 2006, it combines numerology, Tarot, Kabbalistic wisdom, and the chakra energy system into one complete reading.
whatIsMatrix.ctaText: Read the complete Matrix of Destiny guide — what it is, how it works, and how to read your chart

cta.title: Ready to Discover Your Destiny?
cta.subtitle: Less than a minute. Completely free. No sign up.

faq.q: Is the Destiny Matrix Calculator free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free. Enter your birth date and get your full matrix with health chart, interpretations, and life purpose analysis — no sign up required.
A complete matrix with health chart (chakra system), soul comfort zone, talents, money energy, karmic tasks, relationship analysis, life purpose, personal year forecast, and more.

faq.q: How accurate is the Destiny Matrix?
faq.a: Based on established numerological principles using 22 archetypal energies. It provides valuable self-reflection insights into your strengths, challenges, and life direction.
It calculates the energy dynamics between two people, showing relationship strengths, challenges, love line compatibility, and growth potential.

faq.q: Can I check my child's matrix?
faq.a: Yes! Our Child Matrix calculator helps parents understand their child's natural talents, challenges, and best development strategies.
